title: agrostis alba var. hispanica
intro: Agrostis alba var. hispanica, also known as Spanish bent or white bent, is a type of grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. hispanica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
